'''Jonas Fel'Kona''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] as a [[Jedi recruiter|recruiter]] for the [[Acquisition Division/Legends|Acquisition Division]] during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] last years.

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Jonas Fel'Kona was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], training as a [[Jedi recruiter|recruiter]] after achieving [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knighthood]]. A respected member of the [[Acquisition Division/Legends|Acquisition Division]], Fel'kona was attuned to the Force in such a way that he was able to locate potential [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiates]] from afar. Indeed, one of his most prominent finds, [[Lanius Qel-Bertuk]], would go on to be headmaster of the experimental [[Almas Academy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="DWL" />
